detail.description:
How far can your luck take you? Have you tested your limits?
Introducing the ultimate luck-based tower defense game!
Try [Lucky Defense] now and push your LUCK to the extreme!

🍀 Summoning units is all based on LUCK! Beat the odds!
🍀 Yes, it's a tower defense game! Defeat the monsters!
🍀 You can also merge units! You just never know what you'll get!
🍀 Feeling LUCKY? Take a big swing with the roulette!

To rise or to fall, LUCK is the question!
Lucky Defense - A casual tower defense all about

■ 2nd Anniversary Festival! Massive Adventure Content Now Open!
- Log in now to instantly claim 11,111 Diamonds and enjoy tons of special rewards!
■ Beyond Immortal! New Limit-Break Update!
■ Bug Fixes & Other Improvements
